titel: Report on the allocation of funds from the General Inheritance Fund during the fiscal year 2025.
html: This document provides an overview of the management of the "Allmänna arvsfonden" (General Legacy Fund) and details how the "Arvsfondsdelegationen" (Legacy Fund Delegation) distributed funds from the fund during 2025. Furthermore, the government outlines its assessment of the "Arvsfondsdelegationen's" activities and development, and analyzes the allocation of support within various areas. The document also specifies the future direction of support from the "Allmänna arvsfonden" and identifies the areas that the government believes should be prioritized when the "Arvsfondsdelegationen" makes decisions about funding.
tldr: The government is outlining how funds from the "Allmänna arvsfonden" (General Legacy Fund) will be allocated in 2025, explaining which areas are considered most important for future investment.
lattlast:
The government has produced a report detailing how the funds from the "Allmänna arvsfonden" (General Legacy Fund) are being used. This fund is a state-owned pool of money that supports various projects and initiatives in Sweden.

The report describes how the decision-makers responsible, known as the "Arvsfondsdelegationen," allocated funds during the year 2025. It also examines the progress made with these funds so far and identifies areas that require the most support.

Finally, the government explains its priorities for the future. This involves determining which types of projects or initiatives will receive assistance from the "Arvsfonden" when new decisions are made.
